'''Tharence Wo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Tharence Wo was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] sometime during the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]]. Studying independently as a [[Jedi Consular|Consular]], Master Wo specialized as an [[Jedi Researcher|anthropologist]] and was responsible for compiling an abundance of research on the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] species.<ref name="AoW" />

Crafting a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] known as the [[Tharence Wo's holocron|''Journals of Tharence Wo'']], the records became obscure by the end of the Golden Age, lost in the mass of texts held in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When an [[Yinchorri Uprising|uprising]] began in the [[Yinchorri system]], the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] dispatched two Jedi, [[Naeshahn]] and [[Ebor Taulk]], to quell the riots; both were murdered and their bodies shipped back to the Temple. It wasn't until Master [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] rediscovered the journals in the Archives that the High Council had proper insight into the situation and were able to plan a new strategy for dealing with the conflict.<ref name="AoW" />
